# Megsy AI

> All-in-one AI workspace for chat, image generation, video creation, slides, code, and research — built for creators and teams.

Megsy AI brings together leading AI models for text, images, video, audio, and code in a single creative workspace. Generate content, build sites, run deep research, and collaborate with your team.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Megsy AI and what it can do.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, credits, and team pricing.
- [Enterprise](/enterprise): Enterprise features, security, and SLAs.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.
- [Support](/support): Help center and customer support.
- [About Egypt](/egypt): Megsy AI's commitment to Egypt and the region.
- [Trust Center](/trust): Security, privacy, and compliance overview.
- [Security](/security): Security practices and reporting.

## Legal

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookies): How we use cookies.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): Refund terms.
- [Content Policy](/policies/content): Acceptable content guidelines.
- [AI Disclaimer](/legal/ai-disclaimer): Notes on AI-generated content.
- [DMCA](/legal/dmca): Copyright takedown process.
- [DPA](/legal/dpa): Data processing addendum.
- [Affiliate Terms](/legal/affiliate): Affiliate program terms.
